title: Starshining
lyrics: And you, ooh Star shining baby you're brighter than the world Yeah star shining baby you might as well be my girl Might as well be my, my world Yeah star shining baby you star shine You're making me go insane The lost and time of mine Yeah star shining baby you star shine Baby you find a way Got you looking bright Yeah got you looking finer Than the Arizona sunshine Don't sit on this line Oh yeah you're shining better Shining brighter than the Arizona sunshine Yeah shining better Cause you're lost in your own world Oh it's all designer this designer That a money this a money That you come around and flip around You're looking good from the back I know it's just a thing We can do to be more or less bored Hey so you're shining brighter So you're shining brighter Come around here you can reflect off the rings Of the only day and the only thing You want that kid Think you're something positive Brighter than the world Yeah brighter when you're my girl Brighter than the world Yeah brighter when you're my girl And oh you're shining So fucking bright Yeah you're shining For me tonight Yeah Shining brighter than You're shining brighter than the Arizona sunshine Shining brighter than Shining brighter than My only thing I can see In fantasy a dream A dream of reality between the sheets You're shining brighter than the Arizona sunshine Come and reflect off me
